modeChangeConditions.toNormal: CONDITIONS MET — executed. Mode now normal.
modeChangeConditions.toConservative: New high-severity security regression without PR, or >2 conflicted PRs without progress.
modeChangeConditions.toElevated: New critical security issue without PR, main CI failure rate >20%, or merge conflict cascade (>3 PRs).
modeChangeConditions.toCritical: New security regression on main, main CI failure rate >30%, or 2+ unresolved critical issues without PRs.
